creator: oliver.pntr@gmail.com
text:
when unplug the power cord from HP ProBook 5310m, then timed out the ethernet interface (msk0)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 1) plug in the power cord
2) boot
3) after interface come up
4) unplug the power cord
